subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta, Dr. Esslemont et al, spoken on 1920-01-03
subcodes.first_line: The object is that all affairs ought to be referred to the Convention... The essential thing now is teaching.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @contention and conflict, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @consultation
